locations.name: Conglomerate
locations.description: Territory/sector of Omni Global Solutions. A mega conglomerate with fingers in every major industry sector.

locations.name: Industrial / Transport
locations.description: Territory/sector of Toha Heavy Industries. A dominant industrial and transport corporation controlling logistics and heavy manufacturing across the Mona Rise megalopolis.

locations.name: Servers / Orbital
locations.description: Territory/sector of TekNet Megacorp. Manages server infrastructure and orbital data relay networks across the megalopolis.

locations.name: Digital Finance
locations.description: Territory/sector of MezoTuring Hosaka. A Martian family-run megacorp specializing in digital money, financial instruments, and encrypted transactions.

locations.name: Weird / Meta-Human Supply
locations.description: Territory/sector of Baba Yaga's. A loose network of street vendors dealing in MeTa (meta-human) paraphernalia — weird augmentations, ritual materials, eldritch supplies, and Weird Stuff for the meta-talented community.

locations.name: Meta-Talented Rights / Political
locations.description: Territory/sector of The Gathering. A political consortium of meta-talented individuals — Whisperers, Channelers, heritage-bearers — advocating for meta-human rights through legal and political channels.

locations.name: Unknown / Weird
locations.description: Territory/sector of The Elder. A dragon of iridescent scales.

locations.name: Hacktivist / Skeptic
locations.description: Territory/sector of The Shadow Method. A skeptical collective of hacktivists who distrust the 'Weird' — meta-talents, spirits, and eldritch powers — and work to expose what they believe is corporate exploitation or mass delusion.

locations.name: Biosphere-5, Ganymede
locations.description: Territory/sector of Insurgents. A resistance cell operating against Corporate Security (APX) inside Biosphere-5 on Ganymede.
